## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets: what changed and why. The diff shows what; this is for why. -->

## Type

<!-- Pick one; delete the others. -->
- feat — new user-facing functionality
- fix — bug fix
- refactor — internal change, no behavior change
- perf — performance improvement
- docs — documentation only
- test — tests only
- chore / build / ci — tooling

## Linked issue

<!-- `Closes #N` for fixes; `Refs #N` otherwise. -->

## Test plan

- [ ] `make check` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Manually verified end-to-end (one sentence on how)
- [ ] Screenshots or recordings attached for UI changes

## Performance impact

<!-- Required for any change touching the capture or replay hot path. Skip for docs/tooling. -->
- Latency before:
- Latency after:
- Bench command:

## Risks

<!-- What could break? What's the rollback plan if this regresses? -->

## Reviewer notes

<!-- Subtle decisions, alternatives considered, anything that needs careful eyes. -->
